description.zh-Hans: 生成重复的纤维/丝状高光，类似于Substance Designer的Fibers节点。产生可平铺的灰度图像，其中明亮的椭圆形/条纹状高光沿对角线重复。
description.en: Generates repeated fiber/strand-like highlights similar to Substance Designer's Fibers node. Produces a tileable grayscale image where bright elliptical/striped highlights repeat diagonally.

triggers.zh-Hans: 纤维, 丝状高光, 拉丝, 纹理高光, 反光条纹
triggers.en: fibers, strand highlights, brushed metal, anisotropic, filament

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成重复纤维高光纹理，用于金属拉丝、布料或塑料表面的各向异性高光效果。
exampleUsage.en: Generate repeated fiber highlight textures for brushed metal, cloth, or anisotropic surface highlights on plastic.
